'''Hockaleg''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Patriim system/Legends|Patriim system]]. The [[Tarkin (superweapon)|''Tarkin'']] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] was built in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of Hockaleg, with the construction crew living in a [[Hockaleg spaceport|spaceport town]] on the world in between work shifts. Citizens of this world worshiped the deity [[Holy Jaf]].

{{Planet-stub}}
